title: Tough As Nails Create Addon
description: Makes Tough As Nails and Create compatible
body:
**Makes Tough As Nails and Create compatible by adding new fluids and recipes for juices with Mixer and Spout from Create mod.**

**Translations:**

**English (US) - Lorp_OOO**

**Ukrainian - Lorp_OOO**

**German - Llama303** 

**French - Llama303**

**Spanish (Spain) - Llama303**

**If you translated this mod send it to me on Discord or Github.**
